title: Extended pre-reg: Transformer is the new winner (H1+H2 both 5/5 positive)
selection_rule: Highest mean validation Spearman on 2015-2024 across 5 US assets
headline: Transformer is the new pre-reg winner. H1: 5/5 US positive (0.20-0.41). H2: 5/5 US positive (0.18-0.27). This fixes the FNO H2 weakness. Both H1 and H2 are now robustly positive across all 5 US assets.
